---
title: "Caramelized Onions"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Pickling and Fermenting"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   3 tablespoons (42g) unsalted butter

-   1 tablespoon (14g) extra virgin olive oil

-   3.5 lb (1.5kg) sweet onions/Vidalia onions (about 5-6 large) salt to
    taste

**Directions:**

1.  Slice onions thinly.

2.  Add butter and olive oil to a 6-8 qt pot. Heat until it begins to
    boil.

3.  Add the onions and disperse the salt. Heat over medium heat,
    stirring occasionally, for 45 minutes.
